llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm available (gpt4_assisted) vs. the no-AI baseline (no_gpt4). This is a within-subjects crossover design where the same 30 participants completed tasks both with and without GPT-4 assistance.
llm_extracted.notes: Within-subjects crossover design with n=30 participants completing tasks both with and without GPT-4. Means and SDs are provided for each condition, along with the mean difference (0.17) and its 95% CI. The SD of the paired difference scores is not explicitly reported, so Python will need to use the correlation-based approach or approximate from the CI width. The reported SDs (0.59 and 0.50) are the marginal SDs for each condition, not the SD of differences.
source_quotes: Complaint Drafting: No GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 3.14 (0.59), With GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 3.31 (0.50), Difference (95% CI) 0.17 (-0.03, 0.37), p-value 0.0862
Participants assigned to use GPT-4 assistance on two of four tasks
Participants assigned to complete two of four tasks without GPT-4 or any other type of AI assistance

computed.notes: Within-subjects crossover design with n=30 participants completing tasks both with and without GPT-4. Means and SDs are provided for each condition, along with the mean difference (0.17) and its 95% CI. The SD of the paired difference scores is not explicitly reported, so Python will need to use the correlation-based approach or approximate from the CI width. The reported SDs (0.59 and 0.50) are the marginal SDs for each condition, not the SD of differences.
